title: Fix Mobile Login & Dark Mode
description: Address the broken login button on iOS and add dark mode support across the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Login button is tappable on iOS Safari 16+
Dark mode toggle persists across app restarts
All screens support dark mode without visual glitches

tasks.title: Fix iOS touch target size for login button
Add dark mode CSS variables
tasks.description: Define color tokens for dark theme

tasks.title: Implement dark mode toggle in settings
